settings.text:
RevitalEyes is the world's most advanced at-home under-eye light therapy device, combining 4 clinically proven modalities in one elegant device:

• 660nm Red Light — Stimulates collagen production
• 590nm Amber Light — Reduces dark circles & puffiness
• Low-Level Laser — Deep cellular rejuvenation
• Microcurrent EMS — Lifts and tightens skin

Using the same technology trusted by dermatologists and aesthetic clinics worldwide — now available for home use.

RevitalEyes combines four clinically-proven treatment modalities into one sleek, portable device. Our technology is backed by hundreds of peer-reviewed studies and trusted by aesthetic professionals globally.

✓ Reduces fine lines by up to 35%
✓ Decreases dark circles by 87%
✓ Improves skin elasticity by 29%
✓ Clinically proven in 30 days

settings.title: Why RevitalEyes?
settings.text: Talk about how and why is your brand better than the others.

Cleanse Your Skin

Start with clean, dry skin. Remove all makeup, SPF, and skincare products from the under-eye area before beginning your session.

Position the Device

Place RevitalEyes gently under each eye. The ergonomic curved design fits perfectly along your orbital bone for maximum contact and comfort.

Activate & Relax

Press the power button to begin your 10-minute therapy session. The device auto-shuts off. Simply relax and let the clinically-proven wavelengths do their work.

Apply Eye Cream

Immediately after your session, apply your favorite eye cream or serum. Light therapy increases product absorption by up to 40%, amplifying results.

Repeat Daily

Use RevitalEyes every morning for best results. Most customers see visible improvement in dark circles and puffiness within 10–14 days of consistent daily use.

settings.heading: How long before I see results?
settings.row_content: Most customers notice a visible difference within 2–3 weeks of consistent daily use. For best results, use RevitalEyes for 10 minutes each morning. Clinical studies show optimal results are achieved after 4–6 weeks of regular use. Many users report reduced puffiness within the first week!

settings.heading: Is it safe to use around the eyes?
settings.row_content: Yes! RevitalEyes is FDA cleared and specifically designed for the delicate under-eye area. The wavelengths used (660nm and 590nm) are completely safe for use near the eyes and have been used in clinical settings for decades. Always keep the device at least 1cm from your eyelids and do not look directly into the light during use.

settings.heading: How often should I use RevitalEyes?
settings.row_content: We recommend using RevitalEyes once daily for 10 minutes. Consistency is key — make it part of your morning skincare routine for the best results. You can safely use it up to twice daily if desired, but most customers achieve excellent results with once-daily use.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with your results, simply return the device in its original packaging for a full refund — no questions asked. We're that confident in RevitalEyes. Over 94% of customers keep their device and see lasting results.

settings.heading: Can I use it with my eye cream?
settings.row_content: Absolutely! We actually recommend applying your favorite eye cream immediately after your RevitalEyes session. Light therapy has been shown to increase the absorption of topical skincare products by up to 40%, making your eye cream even more effective. Think of RevitalEyes as supercharging your existing skincare routine.

settings.heading: How do I charge RevitalEyes?
settings.row_content: RevitalEyes charges via USB-C (cable included). A full charge takes approximately 1.5 hours and provides up to 30 days of daily use (one 10-minute session per day). An LED indicator shows you the battery status — red means charging, green means fully charged. Perfect for travel too!

settings.heading: Is RevitalEyes suitable for all skin types?
settings.row_content: Yes! RevitalEyes is designed for all skin types including sensitive skin. The 660nm red light and 590nm amber light wavelengths are gentle, non-thermal, and safe for all skin tones. If you have any specific medical conditions affecting your eyes or skin, please consult your healthcare provider before use.

As someone who's tried every eye cream under the sun, I was hesitant to try a device. But WOW. The fine lines around my eyes have visibly reduced after just 4 weeks of daily use. My friends keep asking what I'm doing differently. This is my secret weapon! 💕

I'm a nurse and I've seen red light therapy used clinically. Having this technology at home is a game changer. My patients always ask about my skin and I tell them about RevitalEyes. The results speak for themselves. FDA cleared gives me peace of mind.
